official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound disconnect packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official disconnect body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound disconnect frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns disconnect to packet id 0x20.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the disconnect id to ClientboundDisconnectPacket.
The official disconnect body is a trusted context-free Component reason.
The fixture uses Component.literal(String), so it does not require initialized UI, Level, registry contents, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded reason text, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove UI disconnect handling, screen flow, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer UI disconnect handling, screen flow, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
